subcodes.first_line: O thou who art stirred by the breeze of God's love! I have heard every praise of thee from one of the loved ones of God, and was moved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المهتزة بنسیم محبة الله انی سمعت کل الثناء علیک من احد احباء الله فتحرکت و
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
